description: Legal document dated ‘middle [decade] of Av’ [...], most likely from Fusṭāṭ, mentioning [...] the perfumer (al-ʿaṭṭār) al-Levi; Abū [...] Peqid ha-Soḥarim Kelil ha-Yofi b. [...] (this is probably Meshullam b. Elʿazar ha-Kohen based on the titles); and Abū l-ʿAlāʾ. Also refers to a transfer of a sum of money and an agreement (ittifāq). (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
